description: You are a Sales Operations Manager calculating end-of-quarter commissions. Build a commission payout model in Power BI Desktop using the transaction file C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\sales_data.csv and the quota target file C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\quota_targets.csv. The model must relate the tables on Sales_Rep and include DAX measures for Total_Sales (sum of Sales_Amount), Attainment_Pct (Total_Sales divided by Quota), and Commission_Payout. The payout logic requires $0 commission for attainment below 80%, 5% of Total_Sales for attainment between 80% and 110%, and 8% of Total_Sales for attainment above 110%. Create a Matrix visual showing Sales_Rep, Total_Sales, Quota, Attainment_Pct, and Commission_Payout, and a Scatter Chart with Attainment_Pct on the X-axis and Commission_Payout on the Y-axis. Export the Matrix data to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\commission_report.csv and save the report as C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Commission_Model.pbix.
